content:
F5's hosted NGINX Amplify reached end of life on January 31, 2026. GetPageSpeed Amplify keeps the familiar agent and compatible API running, with monitoring for NGINX, Varnish, PHP-FPM, MySQL and websites.

Now it has an official iPhone app.

Uptime by GetPageSpeed uses the same Amplify account and data already collected by your agents. There is nothing new to install on your servers.

The native app lets you:

• Browse every server and its current health

• Open live NGINX and system metric graphs

• Manage alert rules and webhooks

• Receive real-time push notifications

• Follow host and metric incidents with Live Activities

• Monitor website uptime, response time and SSL certificates

It also includes home-screen widgets, passkeys and two-factor security settings. Existing Amplify users can install it and sign in immediately.

Read the full announcement or download Uptime on the App Store.
